target_cmd: curl -sf -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8791/api/yinyang/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"type":"info","message":"GLOW 97 inspector test","priority":"low"}'
context: Agents must be able to push notifications to YinYang rail. Cem Kaner (BBST): if the notification API fails silently, the agent is blind. POST payload: {type, message, priority}. Response must confirm receipt with an id field. Tests the full agent→UI notification channel.
